news.t: Nicholas Wealth Adds Income-Focused Nuclear and Defense ETFs to Suite

overview.description: The Nicholas Nuclear Income ETF (NUKX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund actively manages a portfolio composed of nuclear industry companies, uranium commodities, and options overlay. The funds selection process is based on valuation, implied volatility, company fundamentals, and macroeconomic factors, including real interest rates and inflation. NUKX was launched on Mar 3, 2026 and is issued by Nicholas.
